# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "app.fullname" . }}
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "app.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount | default 1 }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "app.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "app.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
      annotations:
        checksum/config: {{ include (print $.Template.BasePath "/configmap.yaml") . | sha256sum }}
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: {{ include "app.serviceAccountName" . }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: {{ .Values.securityContext.runAsUser | default 65534 }}
        runAsGroup: {{ .Values.securityContext.runAsGroup | default 65534 }}
        fsGroup: {{ .Values.securityContext.fsGroup | default 65534 }}
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      {{- if .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- range .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
        - name: {{ . }}
        {{- end }}
      {{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ required "image.repository is required" .Values.image.repository }}:{{ required "image.tag is required - do not use 'latest' tag, use a specific commit SHA or semver tag" .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: {{ .Values.securityContext.runAsUser | default 65534 }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.service.targetPort | default 8080 }}
              protocol: TCP
          {{- if .Values.envFrom }}
          envFrom:
            {{- if .Values.envFrom.configMapRef }}
            - configMapRef:
                name: {{ include "app.fullname" . }}-config
            {{- end }}
            {{- if .Values.envFrom.secretRef }}
            - secretRef:
                name: {{ .Values.envFrom.secretRef }}
            {{- end }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if .Values.env }}
          env:
            {{- range $key, $value := .Values.env }}
            - name: {{ $key | quote }}
              {{- if $value.valueFrom }}
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ $value.valueFrom.secretKeyRef.name }}
                  key: {{ $value.valueFrom.secretKeyRef.key }}
              {{- else }}
              value: {{ $value.value | quote }}
              {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
          {{- end }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.path | default "/healthz" }}
              port: http
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.initialDelaySeconds | default 15 }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.periodSeconds | default 20 }}
            timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.timeoutSeconds | default 5 }}
            failureThreshold: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.failureThreshold | default 3 }}
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.path | default "/ready" }}
              port: http
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.initialDelaySeconds | default 5 }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.periodSeconds | default 10 }}
            timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.timeoutSeconds | default 5 }}
            failureThreshold: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.failureThreshold | default 3 }}
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: {{ .Values.resources.limits.cpu | default "500m" }}
              memory: {{ .Values.resources.limits.memory | default "256Mi" }}
              ephemeral-storage: {{ .Values.resources.limits.ephemeralStorage | default "100Mi" }}
            requests:
              cpu: {{ .Values.resources.requests.cpu | default "100m" }}
              memory: {{ .Values.resources.requests.memory | default "128Mi" }}
              ephemeral-storage: {{ .Values.resources.requests.ephemeralStorage | default "50Mi" }}
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            {{- if .Values.extraVolumeMounts }}
            {{- toYaml .Values.extraVolumeMounts | nindent 12 }}
            {{- end }}
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 50Mi
        {{- if .Values.extraVolumes }}
        {{- toYaml .Values.extraVolumes | nindent 8 }}
        {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: ScheduleAnyway
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              {{- include "app.selectorLabels" . | nindent 14 }}
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "app.fullname" . }}-netpol
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "app.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "app.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.allowedIngressNamespaces }}
        {{- range .Values.networkPolicy.allowedIngressNamespaces }}
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: {{ . }}
        {{- end }}
        {{- else }}
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
        {{- end }}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.service.targetPort | default 8080 }}
  egress:
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.extraEgressRules }}
    {{- toYaml .Values.networkPolicy.extraEgressRules | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
